subcodes.first_line: O beloved friends of the All-Glorious One! From the Dayspring of guidance hath the light of truth dawned, shedding its radiance from East unto West [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حضرت کبریانک سوگلی یارانلری مطلع هدایت دن نور حقیقت طلوع ایله مشرقدن مغربه
subcodes.subjects: @obedience to and respect for government authority, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @unity; oneness of humanity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @universal peace; world unity, @non-participation in politics
